title: JULPAE
description:
JULPAE is a free online strategy card game with a Korean-inspired atmosphere.

Players take turns playing cards or passing while reading the flow of the table. Victory is not decided simply by playing the strongest cards. The core of JULPAE is making better decisions based on your opponent’s choices, pass timing, hidden information, and team deduction.

4-Player Online Card Battles

JULPAE’s main mode is a 4-player online card battle. Each player uses their hand to take part in the round, observes the choices of other players, and reacts to the changing flow of the table.

In 4-player mode, the game is not only about playing stronger cards. You must also deduce who may be on your team and decide when to take the lead, when to hold back, and how to help your team reach victory.

1v1 Duel Mode

JULPAE is built around 4-player online card battles, but it also includes a 1v1 Duel Mode for faster matches and easier entry into the game.

In 1v1 Duel Mode, you face your opponent directly and make quick decisions about when to play, when to pass, and when to take control of the table. It is a fast way to learn JULPAE’s core rules and timing-based mind games before moving into deeper 4-player team battles.

Team Deduction and Mind Games

JULPAE includes hidden information. You must observe what happens during the match, read the behavior of other players, and make better decisions with incomplete information.

Reading who is trying to take control, who may be passing on purpose, and when to make your move is a key part of the game.

Fast Decisions and Pass Timing

Having strong cards does not always mean you should play them immediately. Sometimes you need to save a strong hand, and sometimes you need to take control of the table before your opponent does.

Knowing when to play, when to pass, and when to interrupt the opponent’s flow is one of JULPAE’s core strategic elements.

Basic Play, Advanced Play, and Ranked Matches

New players can start with Basic Play to learn the rules and flow of the game. Players who want faster decisions and more competitive matches can move on to Advanced Play and Ranked Matches.

1v1 Duel Mode is suited for quick matches and learning the rules, while 4-player mode offers JULPAE’s main experience with team deduction, timing, and deeper mind games.

Free to Play

JULPAE is free to play. The game may include in-game currency, passes, or optional systems, but it does not include real-money gambling, cash-out features, or rewards with real-world value.

Season 0 Test Operation Notice

JULPAE is preparing for Season 0 test operation. During the test period, balance, rewards, rankings, items, progression records, and other data may be adjusted, reset, deleted, or changed according to service stabilization and operation policies.

Server-Based Multiplayer

Game judgment and major data are processed based on the server. A stable internet connection is required for online play.
description_short: JULPAE is a free-to-play 4-player online card battle game with a Korean-inspired atmosphere. Learn the flow quickly in 1v1 duels, then infer hidden teams, play or pass, and read the match through timing, decisions, and mind games.
